argv:
from pathlib import Path
import importlib.util,sys
root=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI")
path=root/Path(r"System/EngineeringWorkshop/ContractBridge/contract_bridge_v1.py")
spec=importlib.util.spec_from_file_location("contract_bridge_inspect",path)
assert spec and spec.loader
module=importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); sys.modules[spec.name]=module; spec.loader.exec_module(module)
result=module.inspect_current(root)
assert result["fixed_file_list_only"] is True
assert result["filesystem_walk_performed"] is False
assert result["workshop_bridge_found"] is True
assert result["patch_engine_found"] is True
assert "write_file" in result["actions_seen"]
assert "replace_text" in result["actions_seen"]
assert result["all_reference_hashes_verified"] is True
usage="\n".join(row["usage"] for row in result["command_usage_evidence"])
for command in ("workshop begin","workshop locate","workshop preview","workshop apply"):
 assert command in usage,command
print("CONTRACT_BRIDGE_R1_CURRENT_WORKSHOP_EVIDENCE_OK")
